# Data Model: Professional PDF Security Assessment Report with tachi Branding

## Theme Token Contract (theme.typ)

### Brand Color Tokens

| Token Name | Type | Hex Value | Source |
|------------|------|-----------|--------|
| `brand-primary` | color | `#1B2A4A` | Tachi Indigo — headers, primary surfaces |
| `brand-secondary` | color | `#2D4A6F` | Steel Blue — supporting elements |
| `brand-accent` | color | `#C93A40` | Vermillion — classification, CTAs, emphasis |
| `brand-highlight` | color | `#B8963E` | Muted Gold — premium touches (sparingly) |
| `brand-dark` | color | `#0D0D0D` | Lacquer Black — body text on dark mode |
| `brand-light` | color | `#F5F2EB` | Washi White — page backgrounds, cards |
| `brand-muted` | color | `#64748B` | Ash Gray — secondary text, captions, footers |

### Logo Path Tokens

| Token Name | Type | Default Value | Notes |
|------------|------|---------------|-------|
| `logo-primary-path` | string | `"../../brand/final/tachi-logo-primary.png"` | Overridden by report-data.typ at runtime |
| `logo-horizontal-path` | string | `"../../brand/final/tachi-logo-horizontal.png"` | Overridden by report-data.typ at runtime |

### Font Stack Tokens (moved from shared.typ)

| Token Name | Type | Value |
|------------|------|-------|
| `font-heading` | array | `("Helvetica Neue", "Helvetica", "Arial", "New Computer Modern")` |
| `font-body` | array | `("New Computer Modern", "Charter", "Georgia", "Times New Roman")` |
| `font-mono` | array | `("Menlo", "Courier New", "Courier")` |

### Severity Colors (NOT in theme.typ — remain in shared.typ)

| Token Name | Hex | Rationale |
|------------|-----|-----------|
| `severity-critical` | `#DC2626` | Functional constant, not brand |
| `severity-high` | `#F97316` | Functional constant, not brand |
| `severity-medium` | `#EAB308` | Functional constant, not brand |
| `severity-low` | `#4169E1` | Functional constant, not brand |

---

## Scope Data Contract (report-data.typ additions)

### scope-components

Array of dictionaries. Extracted from threats.md Section 1 component table.

```typst
#let scope-components = (
  (name: "string", type: "string", description: "string"),
)
```

| Field | Source Column | Required |
|-------|-------------|----------|
| `name` | Component | Yes |
| `type` | Type | Yes |
| `description` | Description | Yes |

### scope-data-flows

Array of dictionaries. Extracted from threats.md Section 1 data flows table.

```typst
#let scope-data-flows = (
  (source: "string", destination: "string", data: "string", protocol: "string"),
)
```

### scope-trust-boundaries

Array of dictionaries. Extracted from threats.md Section 2 trust zones table.

```typst
#let scope-trust-boundaries = (
  (zone: "string", trust-level: "string", components: "string"),
)
```

### scope-boundary-crossings

Array of dictionaries. Extracted from threats.md Section 2 boundary crossings table.

```typst
#let scope-boundary-crossings = (
  (crossing: "string", from-zone: "string", to-zone: "string", components: "string", controls: "string"),
)
```

### Scope Counts

```typst
#let scope-component-count = 0
#let scope-data-flow-count = 0
#let scope-trust-boundary-count = 0
```

---

## Brand Asset Variables (report-data.typ additions)

```typst
#let has-logo-primary = false
#let has-logo-horizontal = false
#let logo-primary-path = none
#let logo-horizontal-path = none
```

---

## Configuration Variables (report-config.typ)

```typst
#let show-disclaimer = true
#let show-methodology = true
#let custom-disclaimer-text = none   // none = use defaults
#let custom-footer-text = none       // none = "Generated by tachi"
```

---

## Updated report-data.typ Full Variable List (v1.1)

### Existing (PRD-054)
- `project-name`, `assessment-date`, `classification`
- `critical-count`, `high-count`, `medium-count`, `low-count`, `total-findings`
- `has-threat-report`, `has-risk-scores`, `has-compensating-controls`
- `has-funnel-image`, `has-baseball-image`, `has-architecture-image`
- `data-source-tier`
- `funnel-image-path`, `baseball-image-path`, `architecture-image-path`
- `executive-narrative`, `component-distribution`
- `findings`, `coverage-matrix`, `controls`, `coverage-summary`
- `remediation-actions`

### New (PRD-060)
- `scope-components`, `scope-data-flows`, `scope-trust-boundaries`, `scope-boundary-crossings`
- `scope-component-count`, `scope-data-flow-count`, `scope-trust-boundary-count`
- `has-logo-primary`, `has-logo-horizontal`
- `logo-primary-path`, `logo-horizontal-path`
